regions.text: All organisms have needs in common: air, water, food, and the sun’s light and heat. But men have many other needs, like our need for other people.
We need other people to do things for us when we are very young, very old, or when we are ill. We need others to take care of us.
We need their help and their love. care: when people look after us and help us.
love: warm feeling for someone. Desire to take care of a person is one sort of love.
